word: H4757 - מְרֹאדַךְ בַּלְאָדָן - Mᵉrôʼdak Balʼâdân - mer-o-dak' bal-awdawn' - Merodach-baladan

sections.paragraph:
Original: מראדך בּלאדן

Transliteration: mer'ôdak bal'âdân

Phonetic: mer-o-dak' bal-aw-dawn'

BDB Definition:

Merodach-baladan = "Marduk has given a son"
  1. king of Babylon in the days of king Hezekiah of Judah

Origin: of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
